description: Plugin-distributed hooks for people-operations-hr. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags HR anti-patterns (biased JD language, plaintext PII/SSN, comp figures without bands, interviews without structured scorecards). Set PEOPLE_OPS_HR_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
